author: xryul
description: Navigate between incoming links (inlinks), outgoing links (outlinks) N levels deep.

manifest.author: xRyul
manifest.description: Navigate between incoming links (inlinks), outgoing links (outlinks) N levels deep. Links from Canvas are also supported.
manifest.name: Link Navigation

name: Link Navigation

releases.author: xRyul
releases.description:
## NEW: 

 Added ability for user to customize for INLINKS/OUTLINKS are being displayed.  https://github.com/xRyul/link-navigation/issues/2 , https://github.com/xRyul/link-navigation/issues/15,  https://github.com/xRyul/link-navigation/issues/16

It is possible to show custom text, custom arrow, any icon, emoji etc. For example:
  
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/23db1592-cb96-444c-9d3d-dc54b0b95d99) - 2 icons + counts
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/3565aa7f-206c-4db2-8dea-1216b3f0188a) - only 2 icons
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/34940db1-77aa-4183-be2a-98d4d25ede1b) - custom emoji
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/697557d6-c13a-4072-b9bd-bab5a178c8f4) - none

## Other:
- Separation of concern for toggles in the modal and inside the settings. Options in the settings are now only responsible for rendering toggle buttons and toggles are responsible for actual display of tags/attachments/canvas links. In the past it was all under 1 roof and caused some inconsistencies.

releases.author: xRyul
releases.description:
feat: ✨ A few extra supported file format in particular for various programming languages. Slight modifications to regex.
- All files ending with nay of these extensions 'py', 'js', 'ts', 'html', 'css', 'json', 'xml', 'java', 'cpp', 'cs', 'rb', 'php', 'swift', 'go', 'rs', 'sh' will have following icon prepended to them 💻. Hopefully, allowing to distinguish attached files from the rest of the links more easily.

feat: ✨ Toggle to show tags
fix: 🐛 : Broken UI when enabling toggles from the settings 
fix: 🐛 : Tags which are found under current note should be shown not under outlinks, but under current note itself 
fix: 🐛 : When Outlinks of inlinks is enabled sometimes it also finds attachments

releases.author: xRyul
releases.description:
feat: ✨ Add support for Notes embedded in another note via '![[embed]]' https://github.com/xRyul/link-navigation/issues/14
feat: ✨ Add support to show attachments with corresponding icon next to the attachment link:

- **🖼️ Images**: avif, bmp, gif, jpeg, jpg, png, svg, webp, tif, tiff, psd, dng, heif, heic, cr2, nef, ico
- **🎵 Audio**: flac, m4a, mp3, ogg, wav, webm, 3gp
- **🎥 Video**: mkv, mov, mp4, ogv, avi
- **📄 Documents**: pdf, doc, docx, xlsx, pptx, djvu, epub
- **🗜️ Archives**: zip, 7z, tar, gz, rar, xc, bzip2, iso, cmg, msi

fix: ⚡ Fix notes with heading embbeds not showing https://github.com/xRyul/link-navigation/commit/b312e366dafcb259c572cab4dfb5683f803e1516

releases.author: xRyul
releases.description: Add ability to close Detailed View via ESC key https://github.com/xRyul/link-navigation/issues/13

releases.author: xRyul
releases.description:
- Ability to add shortcut to show/hide Detailed View https://github.com/xRyul/link-navigation/issues/10
    ![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/42de48f7-ab9b-4e1c-a26d-aed03a352380)

releases.author: xRyul
releases.description:
- CMD+ CLICK - to open note in a new tab
- Layout improvements for small screens

releases.author: xRyul
releases.description:
- [Move styling from Javascript into CSS](https://github.com/xRyul/link-navigation/commit/ef84aa7873b08777cabf7661d4264637cd3ceae9)
- [Fix INLINKS OUTLINGs not showing up on Orphan notes. Fix NavBar stuck on Loading...](https://github.com/xRyul/link-navigation/commit/93e96106dabd6b7d299bc75f7f5b682705ff5ecf)
- [New command to Force Refrech the inlinks](https://github.com/xRyul/link-navigation/commit/1ccadb67d552c4bbde2cb5f9339ccc426da919b2)
- [Always show both INLINKS and OUTLINKs even if no links are present](https://github.com/xRyul/link-navigation/commit/9904432bd8ffa0c73d6eb9bdb0a45de2725571e5)

releases.author: xRyul
releases.description:
Improvement to how inlinks and outlinks are being calculated. Move away from pure recursion, depth approach and stack or set. Instead it now uses QUEUE which is up to 11x faster (although negligible for user experience) and more efficient, as well as uses iterative approach focusing on breadth.

Improvement to current-note positioning e.g. depending on the depth specified current-note title should now also update accordingly in the hierarchy.
